OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Eleanor Mackewn 
Sent: 06 March 2025 11:20
To: Ninjeri Pandit ; Ailsa Terry ; PUS Action ; 
 ; Victoria Busby ; 
 (Protocol) 
Subject: Urgent: Advice for DssE visit to NYC
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY
All,
The Duchess of Edinburgh will be New York next week to coincide with the 69th Session 
of the UN Commission on the Status of Women (CSW). Her role as patron for the NGO 
PATH provided the original hook for the visit. It was agreed with Buckingham Palace in 
late January that HRH was permitted to add additional serials to her programme to 
support HMG objectives. These additional programme elements are all closely aligned 
to the Duchess' long-standing advocacy for work preventing Conflict Related Sexual 
Violence, and women's rights more broadly (including in other geographies, such as 
Afghanistan). The King's Principal Private Secretary has asked Royal Unit to 
provide the PUS, PPS/PM and PS/PM advice on the programme, seeking an urgent 
steer on whether the FCDO and Number 10 believe the visit should proceed (or be 
amended).
The Ukrainian programme components are 
:
•
The first is HRH speak at a meeting of the International Alliance on PSVI. The UK
created the alliance in 2023, but Ukraine is the Chair in 2025. The DPM of Ukraine will
host the meeting next week, though the Duchess’ intervention is planned to focus on her
visit to Chad, not Ukraine. FCDO officials believe this event is not contentious and hope
the Duchess is permitted to attend and speak about Chad.
parsing_notes: Extract meeting date/time, list of attendees (name + role), agenda/discussion topics as bullet items, any action points (AP 1:, AP 2: patterns). Attendees yield ATTENDED edges with date. Topics/APs are content nodes linked to the meeting event.
